name: tubegenius
description: Full-stack Django & Next.js platform with comprehensive quality checks

scripts.check:website: cd website && pnpm lint && pnpm prettier:check && pnpm type-check
scripts.check:web-app: cd web-app && pnpm lint && pnpm prettier:check && pnpm type-check
scripts.check:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.format: cd website && pnpm prettier:fix && pnpm lint:fix
scripts.format:web-app: cd web-app && pnpm prettier:fix && pnpm lint:fix
